themes.name: Graywolf
themes.description: The default light palette. Orange primary, green accent, strong solid badges.

themes.name: Graywolf Night
themes.description: Dark variant of the default palette. Easier on the eyes after sunset.

themes.name: High Contrast
themes.description: Light, maximum-legibility. Pure-black text on white for bright sunlight and low vision.

themes.name: High Contrast Night
themes.description: Dark, maximum-legibility. Pure-white text on black; no faded dark-mode copy.
